subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the holy fragrances! It is seven o'clock at night, and this wanderer in the wilderness of the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات قدس ساعت هفت از شب است و این آواره بیداء محبت الله
subcodes.subjects: @infallibility; sinlessness ['ismat], @praise and encouragement, @prayer for protection, @love of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
